zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Clinton於1471年出生在英國斯塔福爾阿敏頓時，他的父親John Clinton Baron of Clinton37歲，母親Elizabeth Fiennes20歲。他於1490年與Elizabeth Morgan在威爾士蒙姆爾特雷德加結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1514年6月4日在威爾士蒙姆爾特雷德加享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Clinton于1471年出生在英国斯塔福爾阿敏頓时，他的父亲John Clinton Baron of Clinton37岁，母亲Elizabeth Fiennes20岁。他于1490年与Elizabeth Morgan在威尔士蒙姆爾特雷德加结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1514年6月4日在威尔士蒙姆爾特雷德加享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clinton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Louth, Westmeath) and Scottish: shortened form of   McClinton  .

English: habitational name, either from Glympton in Oxfordshire, named as ‘settlement (Old English tūn) on the Glym river’, a Celtic river name meaning ‘bright stream’, or from Glinton in Northamptonshire, early recorded as Clinton (named with an unrecorded Old English element akin to Middle Low German glinde ‘enclosure, fence’ + Old English tūn). The surname was taken to Ireland in or before the 16th century.

History: Charles Clinton (born 1690 in Longford, Ireland) organized a group of colonists and founded the settlement of Little Britain, Ulster County, NY, in 1731. His son George Clinton (1739–1812) was governor of NY (1777–95), and they had many prominent descendants. — An English aristocratic family called Clinton was founded by Geoffrey de Clinton (flourished 1130), who held lands at Glympton, Oxfordshire. He was chamberlain and treasurer to Henry I (1100–35).

variants.name: McClinton
meanings: Irish (northern) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Fhionntain (Scottish), Mac Giolla Fhionntáin (Irish) ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) Fionntan’, whose name has been explained as ‘the white ancient’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Clinton was born in 1471, in Amington, Staffordshire, England, his father, John Clinton Baron of Clinton, was 37 and his mother, Elizabeth Fiennes, was 20. He married Elizabeth Morgan in 1490, in Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 4 June 1514, in Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Wales, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Clinton est né en 1471, à Amington, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Clinton Baron of Clinton, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Fiennes, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Morgan en 1490, à Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 4 juin 1514, à Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Galles, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Clinton 1471 in Amington, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Clinton Baron of Clinton 37 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Fiennes 20. Er hat 1490 in Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Wales Elizabeth Morgan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 4. Juni 1514 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Clinton è nato il nel 1471 nel Amington, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, John Clinton Baron of Clinton, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Fiennes, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Morgan nel 1490, nel Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 4 giugno 1514, nel Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Galles, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Clintonが1471年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアアミントンで生まれた時，父John Clinton Baron of Clintonは37歳，母Elizabeth Fiennesは20歳であった。1490年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアトレデガーでElizabeth Morganと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1514年6月4日にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアトレデガーで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Clinton(이)가 1471년 영국 스태퍼드실르 아밍턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Clinton Baron of Clinton(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Fiennes(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1490년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 트레데가에서 Elizabeth Morgan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1514년 6월 4일 웨일스 몬모우스실르 트레데가에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Clinton nasceu em 1471, em Amington, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Clinton Baron of Clinton, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Fiennes, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Morgan em 1490, em Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 4 de junho de 1514, em Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Gales, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Clinton родился в 1471 г. в местности амингтон, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Clinton Baron of Clinton было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Fiennes, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Morgan в 1490 г. в местности тредегар, монмоутшир, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 4 июня 1514 г. в местности тредегар, монмоутшир, Уэльс в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Clinton nació en 1471, en Amington, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Clinton Baron of Clinton, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Fiennes, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Morgan en 1490, en Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 4 de junio de 1514, en Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Gales, a la edad de 43 años.
